Re-Ntc Of Mtn For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default And Default Judgment And Granting Deft Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Defendant/Moving Party Augustine Fallay present in pro per.
Gretchen J. Kenney, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff/Oppostioner Crystal Lei.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court denied defendant's motion.
Ms. Kenney to prepare an Order and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Continued To Jul-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ruth Elin Auerbach, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Crystal Lei, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Augustine Fallay.
Default entered against defendant on July 17, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Crystal Lei, and against the Defaulted Defendant Augustine Fallay as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $26,854.74.
Attorney's Fees - $5,425.00.
Costs - $330.00, for a total of $82,609.74.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
